Part.Source:
Event Start
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False &FilCod.Visible = False &CteCod.Visible = False Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&Mensagem = 'Condições de uso da Carta de Correção, informar a literal' &Mensagem1 = '"A Carta de Correção é disciplinada pelo 1°-A do art. 7º do Convênio S/N, de 15 de dezembro de 1970' + newLine()+'e pode ser utilizada para regularização de erro ocorrido na emissão de Documentos Fiscais, desde que' + newLine()+'o Erro não Esteja relacionado com:' &Mensagem2 = 'I - as variáveis que determinam o valor do imposto tais como: Base de Cálculo, Alíquota,' + newLIne() + 'Diferença de Preço, Quantidade, Valor da Operação ou da Prestação;'
&Mensagem3 = 'II - a Correção de dados Cadastrais que implique mudança do remetente ou do Destinatário;' &Mensagem4 = 'III - a Data de Emissão ou de Saída;"'
Do 'GetCCe'
Do 'PreencheGrupo'
EndEvent
Event Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar.
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &Deletar.FromImage(ActionDelete) &Deletar.TooltipText = "Deletar"
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAdicionar'
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' if &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = true If &CteCCeGrp = 'Idoutros' &CteCCeGrp = &CteCCeOutGrp EndIf If &CteCCeCam = 'Idoutros' &CteCCeCam = &CteCCeOutCam EndIf
GravaCCeCte.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &CteCCeCod,&CteCCeDta,&CteCCeHor,&CteCCeGrp,&CteCCeCam,&CteCCeVlr) do 'GetCarta' Grid.Refresh() EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &CteCCeGrp.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Grupo'), DVMessageType.error, &CteCCeGrp.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &CteCCeCam.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Campo'), DVMessageType.error, &CteCCeCam.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &CteCCeVlr.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Valor'), DVMessageType.error, &CteCCeVlr.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteCCeGrp = 'Idoutros') AND &CteCCeOutGrp.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Outro Grupo'), DVMessageType.error, &CteCCeOutGrp.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteCCeCam = 'Idoutros') AND &CteCCeOutCam.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Outro Campo'), DVMessageType.error, &CteCCeOutCam.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (&CteCCeGrp = 'Idoutros') &CteCCeOutGrp.Visible = False CteCCeOutGrp_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &CteCCeOutGrp.Visible = True CteCCeOutGrp_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If Not (&CteCCeCam = 'Idoutros') &CteCCeOutCam.Visible = False CteCCeOutCam_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &CteCCeOutCam.Visible = True CteCCeOutCam_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-8 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &CteCCeGrp.IsValid
Do 'GetCampo' Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &CteCCeCam.IsValid
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &CteCCeCam.Click
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event Enter
Return
EndEvent
Event &Deletar.Click
DeletaCceCte.call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, CteCCeCod,CteCCeInfCod) refresh keep
EndEvent
Sub 'PreencheGrupo'
&CteCCeGrp.AddItem('ide','ide - Identificação') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('toma4','toma4 - Tomador Outros') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('enderToma','enderToma - End. Tomador') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('emit','emit - Emitente') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('enderEmit','enderEmit - End. Emitente') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('rem','rem - Remetente') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('enderReme','enderReme - End. Remetente') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('exped','exped - Expedidor') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('enderExped','enderExped - End. Expedidor') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('receb','receb - Recebedor') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('enderReceb','enderReceb - End. Recebedor') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('dest','dest - Destinatário') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('enderDest','enderDest - End. Destinatário') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('vPrest','vPrest - Valores Serviço') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('Comp','Comp - Componentes') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('infCarga','infCarga - Carga') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('infQ','infQ - Carga Qtde') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('infNF','infNF - Inf das NF') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('infOutros','infOutros - Inf outros Doc') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('idDocAntEle','idDocAntEle - Doc Anterior Eletronico') &CteCCeGrp.AddItem('Idoutros','Outros Grupos')
EndSub
Sub 'GetCampo'
&CteCCeCam.Clear() Do case Case &CteCCeGrp = 'ide' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('CFOP','CFOP') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('natOp','Natureza da Operação') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMunIni','Cód. Mun. início prestação') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMunIni','Nome Mun. início prestação') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UFIni','UF início prestação') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMunFim','Cód. Mun. fim prestação') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMunFim','Nome Mun. fim prestação') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UFFim','UF fim prestação')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'toma4' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xNome','Razao Social') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('fone','Telefon') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('email','E-mail')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'enderToma' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xLgr','Logradouro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nro','Nro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xBairro','Bairro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMun','IBGE Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMun','Nome Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('CEP','CEP') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UF','UF')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'emit' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xNome','Razão Social')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'enderEmit' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xLgr','Logradouro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nro','Nro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xBairro','Bairro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMun','IBGE Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMun','Nome Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('CEP','CEP') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UF','UF') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('fone','Fone')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'rem' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xNome','Razão Social') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('fone','Fone') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('email','E-mail')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'enderReme' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xLgr','Logradouro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nro','Nro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xBairro','Bairro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMun','IBGE Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMun','Nome Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('CEP','CEP') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UF','UF')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'exped' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xNome','Razão Social') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('fone','Fone') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('email','E-mail')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'enderExped' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xLgr','Logradouro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nro','Nro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xBairro','Bairro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMun','IBGE Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMun','Nome Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('CEP','CEP') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UF','UF')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'receb' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xNome','Razão Social') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('fone','Fone') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('email','E-mail')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'enderReceb' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xLgr','Logradouro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nro','Nro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xBairro','Bairro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMun','IBGE Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMun','Nome Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('CEP','CEP') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UF','UF')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'dest' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xNome','Razão Social') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('fone','Fone') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('email','E-mail')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'enderDest' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xLgr','Logradouro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nro','Nro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xBairro','Bairro') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cMun','IBGE Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xMun','Nome Cidade') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('CEP','CEP') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('UF','UF')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'vPrest' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vRec','vRec - Valor a Receber')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'Comp' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xNome','xNome - Nome Componente')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'infCarga' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vCarga','vCarga - Valor total da carga') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('proPred','proPred - Produto predominante') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('xOutCat','xOutCat - Outras características')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'infQ' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('cUnid','cUnid - Unidade de Medida') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('tpMed','tpMed - Tipo da Medida') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('qCarga','qCarga - Quantidade')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'infNF' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nRoma','nRoma - Nro Romaneio') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nPed','nPed - Nro Pedido') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('mod','mod - Modelo') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('serie','Série') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nDoc','nDoc - Número') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('dEmi','dEmi - Emissão') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vBC','vBC - Base Cálculo do ICMS') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vICMS','vICMS - Total do ICMS ') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vBCST','vBCST - Base de Cálculo do ICMS ST') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vST','vST - Total do ICMS ST') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vProd','vProd - Total dos Produtos') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('vNF','vNF - Total da NF ') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nCFOP','nCFOP - CFOP Predominante')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'infOutros' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('tpDoc','tpDoc - Tipo Doc') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('descOutros','descOutros - Descrição') &CteCCeCam.AddItem('nDoc','nDoc - Número Doc')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'idDocAntEle' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('chCTe','chCTe - Chave de Acesso')
Case &CteCCeGrp = 'Idoutros' &CteCCeCam.AddItem('Idoutros','Outros Campos')
Otherwise &CteCCeCam.AddItem('Idoutros','Outros Campos') EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'GetCCe'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, CteCCeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod Where CteCCeCod = &CteCCeCod
&CteCCeDta = CteCCeDta &CteCCeHor = CteCCeHor
Exit When none &CteCCeDta = serverdate() &CteCCeHor = SysTime() EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetCarta'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, (CteCCeCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod &CteCCeCod = CteCCeCod exit EndFor
EndSub
